task_completion.description: A rectangle representing the 5000x4000 mm office room is drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangle is visible in the FreeCAD drawing area (Draft or Sketcher workbench). The property panel or grid may indicate it starts at (0,0) and is 5000x4000 mm.

task_completion.description: A hexagonal meeting table is drawn inside the room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 6-sided polygon (hexagon) is visible inside the rectangle. It should appear roughly centered within the rectangular room.

task_completion.description: A dimension line for the 5000 mm width is added to the bottom wall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension line is attached to or parallel to the bottom edge of the rectangle, with text displaying '5000' or '5000.0 mm'.

task_completion.description: The project is saved as a FreeCAD document (.FCStd).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar or the Model tree view displays the filename 'office_layout' or 'office_layout.FCStd'. Alternatively, a 'Save As' dialog shows this filename.

task_completion.description: The drawing is exported as a DXF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog box is visible with the filename 'office_layout.dxf', or a file manager/terminal window shows the 'office_layout.dxf' file in the /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical user interface to create the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is visible and actively used in the screenshots, rather than the agent generating files blindly via a terminal script.

integrity.description: The drawing was created step-by-step in the canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of the drawing (e.g., empty canvas, then rectangle, then hexagon, then dimensions), indicating genuine creation rather than loading a pre-made file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the CAD software by writing raw DXF text.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editor open showing raw DXF or XML code being manually typed or pasted to create the files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 2D floor plan in FreeCAD. The room is a 5000x4000 mm rectangle. The table is a regular hexagon with a 600 mm radius, centered at (2500, 2000). A dimension line must mark the 5000 mm width on the bottom wall. The file must be saved as 'office_layout.FCStd' and exported as 'office_layout.dxf' in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/.
